policy.example: All production systems must be patched within 30 days of a critical CVE

standard.example: Passwords must be minimum 12 characters, rotated every 90 days

procedure.example: 1. Open change ticket. 2. Schedule maintenance window...

guideline.example: Consider using ephemeral credentials for CI/CD pipelines

control.example: MFA implementation, firewall rule, access control list

lifecycle_gates.Published_to_UnderReview: Scheduled review cycle or change event

compliance_auditor.content_needs: Policy hierarchy, control mappings, evidence artifacts

Secure Controls Framework, Policy vs Standard vs Procedure

safety_rules.SC-01: No PII in documentation examples. Use synthetic data or named placeholder conventions (Alice Smith, 555-0100).
safety_rules.SC-02: Security-sensitive content (incident response, vulnerability handling) must not appear in public-facing deliverables.
safety_rules.SC-03: Every statistic must have a traceable citation to government agency, peer-reviewed source, or professional organization.
safety_rules.SC-04: AI-generated sections must be marked [PENDING REVIEW] until human review gate passes.
